## Provider

**Name:**
**Website:**
**API docs (if available):**

## What data does it offer?

- [ ] Match events (pass-by-pass, shot-by-shot)
- [ ] Match stats (aggregated per match)
- [ ] Season stats (aggregated per season)
- [ ] Player data
- [ ] xG / advanced metrics
- [ ] Tracking data (player positions)
- [ ] Other:

## Access method

- [ ] Free API (no key)
- [ ] Free API (key required)
- [ ] Paid API
- [ ] Web scraping
- [ ] File download
- [ ] Other:

## Are you offering to write the docs?

- [ ] Yes, I'll create a PR (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for how)
- [ ] No, just requesting that someone else adds this
